title: Emotional ride in honour of the fallen
bodyText: [{"type":"paragraph","text":"GRAAFF-REINET NEWS - An emotionally charged journey spanning several days and hundreds of kilometres came to a powerful conclusion on Monday, 16 June, as Romero Hector completed a symbolic cycling pilgrimage from Table Mountain to the Valley of Desolation in honour of three fallen South African Navy submariners.","html":"GRAAFF-REINET NEWS - An emotionally charged journey spanning several days and hundreds of kilometres came to a powerful conclusion on Monday, 16 June, as Romero Hector completed a symbolic cycling pilgrimage from Table Mountain to the Valley of Desolation in honour of three fallen South African Navy submariners."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"The ride, titled #Justice4Submarine3 and #Justice4Gillian, commemorated the lives of Lieutenant Commander Gillian Malouw-Hector, Master Warrant Officer William Masela Mathipa and Warrant Officer Class 1 Mmokwapa Lucas Mojela."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"These three tragically lost their lives during a naval exercise off the coast of Kommetjie in September 2023, when they were swept overboard from SAS Manthatisi during a vertical transfer operation involving an SA Air Force Maritime Lynx helicopter.","html":"These three tragically lost their lives during a naval exercise off the coast of Kommetjie in September 2023, when they were swept overboard from SAS Manthatisi during a vertical transfer operation involving an SA Air Force Maritime Lynx helicopter."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"“This journey was never just about distance,” Hector said. “It was about truth, remembrance, and justice.”","html":"“This journey was never just about distance,” Hector said. “It was about truth, remembrance, and justice.”"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The ride served as both a tribute and a call for accountability, urging the South African Navy and Defence Ministry to release the official report into the fatal incident.","html":"The ride served as both a tribute and a call for accountability, urging the South African Navy and Defence Ministry to release the official report into the fatal incident."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The lack of public disclosure has left families and supporters frustrated and seeking answers.","html":"The lack of public disclosure has left families and supporters frustrated and seeking answers."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Throughout the ride, Hector was joined and supported by a network of loved ones and well-wishers.","html":"Throughout the ride, Hector was joined and supported by a network of loved ones and well-wishers."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Heinrich Masimila accompanied him in a support vehicle from Cape Town, while Hector’s brother, Brendan, joined from Beaufort West, offering emotional and physical encouragement.","html":"Heinrich Masimila accompanied him in a support vehicle from Cape Town, while Hector’s brother, Brendan, joined from Beaufort West, offering emotional and physical encouragement."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Communities along the route - Beaufort West, Aberdeen and Graaff-Reinet - opened their hearts, with locals, SAPS officers, traffic departments, cyclists and bikers uniting to honour the memory of the fallen.","html":"Communities along the route - Beaufort West, Aberdeen and Graaff-Reinet - opened their hearts, with locals, SAPS officers, traffic departments, cyclists and bikers uniting to honour the memory of the fallen."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Notably, Malouw-Hector’s best friend and her husband joined the final leg into Graaff-Reinet, adding a deeply personal touch to the campaign’s climax.","html":"Notably, Malouw-Hector’s best friend and her husband joined the final leg into Graaff-Reinet, adding a deeply personal touch to the campaign’s climax."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The arrival at the Valley of Desolation was marked by solemn prayers led by Pr Simon van der Pol and a heartfelt musical tribute at Botanies Sports Grounds, courtesy of Archie Pienaar.","html":"The arrival at the Valley of Desolation was marked by solemn prayers led by Pr Simon van der Pol and a heartfelt musical tribute at Botanies Sports Grounds, courtesy of Archie Pienaar."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"The grounds were generously made available by Johan Nel, providing a peaceful setting for the emotional finale. Amos Grootboom opened the event with a stirring prayer."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"“We are immensely grateful to every person who prayed, messaged or joined online,” the Hector and Reid families said in a joint statement.","html":"“We are immensely grateful to every person who prayed, messaged or joined online,” the Hector and Reid families said in a joint statement."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"“You wrapped us in love and reminded us we are not alone.”","html":"“You wrapped us in love and reminded us we are not alone.”"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The family’s message was clear: “Release the report. Honour their lives. Let justice prevail.”","html":"The family’s message was clear: “Release the report. Honour their lives. Let justice prevail.”"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’","html":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’"}]

images.alt: Emotional ride in honour of the fallen
